title: Value-only Tilt -- REGIME-RESILIENCE test (Yol-1 Asama-1) -- Stage 0 pre-registration
decision_owner: Orchestrator+Cagan (DEC-039). Harness MEASURES + RECOMMENDS; does NOT finalize deployment. Even a PASS does not touch the main system -- Yol-2 OVERLAY candidate at most (<=10-20%), separate O+Cagan decision.
discipline_note: Committed BEFORE any backtest is run and BEFORE any D-Y1-001 result is seen. The NET DECISION RULE (DEC-Y1, 4 gates) is FROZEN here and will NOT be relaxed post-hoc (no threshold lowering, no horizon/window widening, no factor post-hoc adjustment, no regime-boundary tuning). Single-factor VALUE only -- composite FORBIDDEN (value isolated). Snapshot content hashes are recorded below before this pre-results commit. Reproducibility: the run reads these frozen offline snapshots; their content hashes must match.
motivation: Resolves the unresolved Faz-0 (D-183) <-> D-191 conflict for the VALUE factor in isolation: Faz-0 value cross-sectional rank-IC WEAK (honest_t<2) vs D-191 value-only tilt STRONG (fair-null ~99.6%, TL-real CI>0). RR-Y1.md sec.SORU-1 shows this is a known methodological signature (rank-IC spans the whole cross-section; tercile/decile tilt only the extreme deciles), NOT a bug. RR-Y1 also warns BIST value is REGIME-UNSTABLE (Eraslan weak-pos -> Aras NEGATIVE t=-2.90 -> Dogan momentum-dominant) -- weakening is macro-regime driven, NOT publication-decay. So the decisive question is regime-resilience, not a single t>2.
honest_expectation: FAILING is LIKELY. BIST value is periodically negative and D-191 showed an in/out collapse. This test exists to KNOW DEFINITIVELY whether value-only carries a regime-resilient premium -- not in the hope that 'value saves us'. A FAIL is a clean 'tried-and-refuted' archive result, not wasted effort.
basis: RR-Y1.md Recommendations Soru-1 #1 (same-sample rank-IC + decile MR test)
RR-Y1.md Recommendations Soru-1 #3 (single-subperiod t>2 INSUFFICIENT; need >=2 independent subperiods consistent sign)
D-191 K2 armored-backtest infra (k2_factor_tilt) reused READ-ONLY (strangler)
D-183 Faz-0 value rank-IC method (factor_ic_harness honest_t Newey-West HAC)
hypothesis: A long-only, equal-weight, semi-annual-rebalanced VALUE-ONLY tilt (book-to-market PRIMARY; E/P robustness) carries a REGIME-RESILIENT net (cost+tax+slippage) TL-real premium -- positive and significant across at least 2 of 3 independent macro-inflation regimes, not just one subperiod. NULL/expectation: value is regime-dependent (fragile), consistent with the D-191 in/out collapse.
what_this_is_NOT: NOT a composite (value isolated; no quality/lowvol). NOT a parameter sweep (tercile + quintile only; deciles are a monotonicity DIAGNOSTIC). NOT a deployment decision (MEASURE-ONLY; PASS -> overlay CANDIDATE only). The two AYAK-3 regime cuts (3-way + 2-way) are two views of the SAME measurement -> NOT a sweep variant, do NOT count against N<=3.

window.rebalance: semi-annual (anchors Jun-30, Dec-31; last trading day on/before)
window.inherited_from: K2 frozen calendar (k2_tilt_config) -> IDENTICAL sample, so AYAK-1 rank-IC and the tercile tilt are measured on the SAME observations (the whole point of the conflict-resolution leg)

in_out_sample.rule: in-sample = rebalance date < insample_end; out-of-sample = >=. Frozen as a DATE.
in_out_sample.thin_n_caveat: ~6-7 periods/slice -> wide CIs / low power. Reported, NOT over-interpreted.

universe.pool: K2 frozen BIST 100 constituent pool (reused READ-ONLY, loaded_universe_n=112)
universe.adv_floor: NONE (2019 TL volumes << 2024; a 2024-calibrated floor would wrongly trim the early window -- D-184 precedent)

survivorship.bias_direction: OPTIMISTIC upper-bound: excluding (mostly poor-outcome) delisted names inflates the absolute level. The FAIR NULL draws from the SAME survivors pool, so the strategy-vs-null comparison stays fair; only the absolute level is inflated.

primary.orientation: low P/B (cheap) -> higher rank (invert=True on P/B)

robustness.definition: earnings yield E/P = net_income / market_cap; market_cap = (issued_capital/par)*close
robustness.loss_makers: net_income <= 0 -> NaN (E/P defined for profitable firms; rank handles the rest)

value_factor.point_in_time: for each (date, ticker) the latest annual with pub_date <= signal date (+120d lag) -> look-ahead safe (reuse factors PIT helpers)
value_factor.no_composite: value isolated; profitability/lowvol EXCLUDED by design

selection_variants_N_lock.rule: N<=3 selection variants; NO parameter sweep, NO new factors.
selection_variants_N_lock.decile_diagnostic: D1..D10 deciles are an AYAK-2 monotonicity DIAGNOSTIC (cheap-minus-expensive spread + Spearman), NOT a sweep variant -- do NOT count against the N<=3 budget.

ayak1_rank_ic_same_sample.method: daily cross-sectional Spearman rank-IC of the value rank vs forward returns at horizons (63, 126 trading days). honest_t = Newey-West HAC bandwidth = horizon (D-178 overlap correction).
ayak1_rank_ic_same_sample.purpose: expose the 'weak IC + strong tilt on IDENTICAL data' conflict signature -> confirm the conflict is methodological, not a bug.

ayak2_decile_monotonicity.method: split value-ranked eligible names into 10 deciles (D1=expensive .. D10=cheapest); per-decile equal-weight net TL-real over the holding period, averaged across rebalances.
ayak2_decile_monotonicity.reads: cheap-minus-expensive spread + Spearman(decile_idx_cheap_high, return). Premium concentrated at the cheap end (explainable) or noise in the middle?
ayak2_decile_monotonicity.thin_caveat: survivors-only pool ~10-12 names/decile, semi-annual -> wide noise; diagnostic, not over-interpreted.

primary_decision_gate.split: 3-way frozen INFLATION_REGIMES (trend_config, D-186): pre_surge / high_inflation / disinflation
primary_decision_gate.assignment: each holding period assigned by its START date
primary_decision_gate.gate3_pass: >=2 of 3 regimes with consistent POSITIVE sign (single-subperiod t>2 INSUFFICIENT -- RR-Y1 #3)

robustness_sidecheck.split: 2-way simple split at 2023-01-01 (pre/post); thicker periods -> stronger statistics

ayak3_regime_resilience.alignment_reading_rule_FROZEN: 3-way and 2-way ALIGNED (both >=2-positive/both-positive, or both not) -> decision STRONG. DIVERGENT (one positive, one not) -> value is REGIME-DEFINITION-SENSITIVE = FRAGILE (not a stable premium; honest-closure direction). A single split is NEVER trusted alone.
ayak3_regime_resilience.N_note: two cuts of the SAME value measurement -> NOT a sweep, does NOT strain the N<=3 budget.

cost_tax_slippage.reused_from: K2 frozen knobs verbatim (broker tier A, 20 bps/side slippage, 15% dividend withholding, assumed 3% yield drag)
cost_tax_slippage.application: per rebalance: cost = one_way_turnover * (avg_round_trip + 2*slippage_oneway); first entry charged as a round trip (slightly conservative). BIST equities 0% capital gains.

return_basis.primary_GATE: TL-real (TUFE-deflated): real = (1+net)/(cpi1/cpi0) - 1; cpi = frozen daily TUFE index (exposure_d187_tufe, TP.FG.J0)
return_basis.reported_usd: USD-real if a frozen US-CPI series supplied; else USD-NOMINAL (labeled). fx = k2_fx_usdtry (TP.DK.USD.A; PARTIAL early coverage). USD basis is REPORTED, NEVER a gate.
return_basis.tl_real_absent_rule: if TUFE unavailable -> PRIMARY gate INCONCLUSIVE (not silently replaced by relative)

fair_null.design: portfolio-level random-selection null: at each rebalance draw the SAME N names uniformly without replacement from the SAME eligible pool; SAME rebalance dates / holding / cost+tax. Randomizes ONLY name selection.
fair_null.statistic: full-window mean per-period net TL-real return

significance.method: block-bootstrap 95% CI of the per-period net TL-real series
significance.note: semi-annual holding periods NON-overlapping -> near-independent -> block=1

decision_rule_DEC_Y1_4gates.gate1_tl_real_significant_positive: net (cost+tax+slippage) TL-real tercile-tilt mean > 0 AND block-bootstrap 95% CI excludes 0 (CI_low > 0)
decision_rule_DEC_Y1_4gates.gate2_beats_fair_null: beats the fair random-selection null at >= 95th percentile (TL-real)
decision_rule_DEC_Y1_4gates.gate3_regime_resilient: PRIMARY 3-way INFLATION_REGIMES: >=2 of 3 regimes consistent-positive (single-subperiod t>2 INSUFFICIENT). 2-way robustness alignment READ alongside.
decision_rule_DEC_Y1_4gates.gate4_decile_profile_explainable: cheap-minus-expensive net TL-real spread > 0 AND premium concentrated at the cheap end (Spearman(decile_idx_cheap_high, return) > 0)
decision_rule_DEC_Y1_4gates.PASS: ALL 4 gates -> Yol-2 OVERLAY candidate (<=10-20%, ana-sisteme degil; separate O+Cagan decision)
decision_rule_DEC_Y1_4gates.PARTIAL: Gate-1 & Gate-2 & Gate-4 pass but Gate-3 FAILS -> 'value REGIME-DEPENDENT, not a stable premium' (conflict explained but not resilient; consistent with D-191 in/out collapse) -> do NOT allocate
decision_rule_DEC_Y1_4gates.reported_not_gates: USD-real + XU100-relative ALWAYS reported but NEVER decide.
decision_rule_DEC_Y1_4gates.no_post_hoc_relaxation: this 4-gate rule (and the AYAK-3 alignment reading) is frozen; not loosened after seeing results.
decision_rule_DEC_Y1_4gates.tl_real_unavailable: PRIMARY gate INCONCLUSIVE if TUFE absent.

fundamentals.itemcodes_net_income: 3Z (Ana Ortaklik Paylari, parent net income, consistent with book_eaoop=2O)

fx.note: PARTIAL early coverage; USD basis reported-only, non-gating

thresholds_reference.note: VOR measurement knobs live in value_only_regime_config.py (like k2_tilt_config / faz0_config / trend_config), NOT in thresholds.py. The engine must NOT import signals.thresholds / signals.engine / MASTER_WEIGHTS / backtest.engine (architecture invariant, enforced by tests/test_value_only_regime.py).

config_budget: N<=3 selection variants (tercile + quintile); deciles + the two regime cuts are diagnostics/views, excluded by design.
outputs: docs/yol1/value_only_regime_results.json (after run: AYAK-1 rank-IC + AYAK-2 deciles + AYAK-3 regimes x {3-way,2-way} + tercile/quintile tilt x {tl_real, xu100_relative, usd_real} x fair-null x {in,out} + VERDICT)
docs/research/D-Y1-001-value-only-rapor.md (3-ayak + regime table + conflict resolution + DEC-Y1 verdict)
